title: ornithoxanthum zauschneri
intro: Ornithoxanthum zauschneri, also known as Alpine Penny-cress, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe, Asia, and North Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Ornithoxanthum zauschneri include relief from bronchitis, coughs, and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues such as nausea and diarrhea. Herbal preparations of Ornithoxanthum zauschneri include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for various health benefits.
